tasks.command: find ${workspaceFolder}/test/coverage -name 'lcov.*.info' -delete 2>/dev/null; dotnet test --project ${workspaceFolder}/test/WebDriverBiDi.Tests --configuration Release --verbosity normal --coverlet --coverlet-output-format lcov --coverlet-exclude-by-file '**/_/src/**' --results-directory ${workspaceFolder}/test/coverage --coverlet-file-prefix lcov && ${workspaceFolder}/scripts/check-lcov-thresholds.sh --min-line 100 --min-branch 100 --min-method 100 ${workspaceFolder}/test/coverage/lcov.*.info
tasks.label: dotnet: test with coverage (Linux/MacOS)

tasks.command: Remove-Item -Path '${workspaceFolder}/test/coverage/lcov.*.info' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; dotnet test --project '${workspaceFolder}/test/WebDriverBiDi.Tests' --configuration Release --verbosity normal --coverlet --coverlet-output-format lcov --coverlet-exclude-by-file '**/_/src/**' --results-directory '${workspaceFolder}/test/coverage' --coverlet-file-prefix lcov; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { & '${workspaceFolder}/scripts/check-lcov-thresholds.ps1' -MinLine 100 -MinBranch 100 -MinMethod 100 @(Get-Item '${workspaceFolder}/test/coverage/lcov.*.info') }
tasks.label: dotnet: test with coverage (Windows)
